title: Front Office Manager - dnata India South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - dnata India South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
dnata India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About dnata India South Asia Partners:
dnata India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with dnata India South Asia Partners!
